testcase.name: test_document_inheritance
testcase.failure:
sample_codebase = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-mmartin/pytest-6/test_document_inheritance0/sample_project') tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-mmartin/pytest-6/test_document_inheritance0')
def test_document_inheritance(sample_codebase, tmp_path): """Test documenting inheritance.""" output = tmp_path / "output" output.mkdir()
sys.path.insert(0, str(sample_codebase)) try: > process_path_or_dot_name(["inheritance_mod"], output_folder=str(output))

output_folder, skip_if_written=not overwrite_existing) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pydoc_fork/commands.py:118: in write_docs_per_module third_party_written = write_docs_live_module(output_folder, 0, skip_if_written) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pydoc_fork/commands.py:145: in write_docs_live_module actual_full_path = document_one(thing, output_folder) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pydoc_fork/commands.py:38: in document_one page_out = render(describe(the_object), the_object, name) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pydoc_fork/reporter/format_page.py:26: in render return page(title, document(the_object, name)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pydoc_fork/reporter/format_page.py:60: in document return docmodule(cast(TypeLike, the_object)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pydoc_fork/reporter/format_module.py:232: in docmodule contents_list.append(document(value, key, name, function_dict, class_dict)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pydoc_fork/reporter/format_page.py:62: in document return docclass(*args) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pydoc_fork/reporter/format_class.py:232: in docclass signature = inspect.signature(cast(Any, the_object)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ format = 1
class ThemeSection(Mapping[str, str]): """A mixin/base class for theme sections.
It enables dictionary access to a section, as well as implements convenience methods. """
# The two types below are just that: types to inform the type checker that the # mixin will work in context of those fields existing > __dataclass_fields__: ClassVar[dict[str, Field[str]]] ^^^^^^^^ E NameError: name 'ClassVar' is not defined
